1

Which of the following mountain ranges runs parallel to the western coast of India?

A

Vindhya Range

 

B

Aravalli Range

 

C

Satpura Range

 

D

Western Ghats

 

E

 

Answer

D

Instruction

The Western Ghats run parallel to the western coast of India, stretching from Gujarat in the north to Tamil Nadu in the south. They are known for their rich biodiversity and play a crucial role in influencing the region's climate and ecology.

 

2

Which of the following is the highest peak in the Western Ghats of India?

A

Anamudi

 

B

Mullayanagiri

 

C

Doddabetta

 

D

Kalsubai

 

E

 

Answer

A

Instruction

Anamudi, located in the Indian state of Kerala, is the highest peak in the Western Ghats and South India, with an elevation of approximately 2,695 meters (8,842 feet). It is known for its scenic beauty and biodiversity, attracting trekkers and nature enthusiasts from around the world.
